zh.title: Web Bot 预言全集 - 网络爬虫语言分析预测系统的14条预言与验证 | Web Bot Predictions
zh.description: Web Bot Project 由 Clif High 于1997年创建，通过网络爬虫和语言学分析预测未来事件。涵盖911事件、2004年海啸、2008年金融危机、加密货币崛起等预测，含真实度验证。
zh.keywords: Web Bot,网络机器人,Clif High,预言,预测,语言分析,网络爬虫,911预言,金融危机预测,加密货币预测
zh.ogTitle: Web Bot 预言全集 | Web Bot Predictions
zh.ogDescription: Clif High 的 Web Bot 预测系统14条预言完整收录与验证分析。通过互联网语言模式变化预测未来事件。
zh.twitterDescription: Web Bot 网络爬虫预测系统14条预言，含真实度验证。声称预测了911事件、2004年海啸、2008年金融危机等。

en.title: Web Bot Predictions - 14 Forecasts from the Internet Linguistic Analysis System (1997-present) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Web Bot Project created by Clif High in 1997 uses web crawling and linguistic analysis to predict future events. Claims include predicting 9/11, 2004 tsunami, 2008 financial crisis, and cryptocurrency rise. Full archive with verification.
en.keywords: Web Bot,Web Bot predictions,Clif High,predictive linguistics,web crawler,future predictions,9/11 prediction,financial crisis,cryptocurrency prediction
en.ogTitle: Web Bot Predictions - Internet Linguistic Analysis Forecasts
en.ogDescription: 14 predictions from Clif High's Web Bot Project. Full archive with real-world verification covering financial crises, natural disasters, and technological shifts.
en.twitterDescription: 14 predictions from the Web Bot Project. Claims: 9/11, 2004 tsunami, 2008 financial crisis. Many retroactively attributed or unfulfilled.
